"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
role_state = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
state = json.loads(role_state.read_text()) if role_state.exists() else {}
cycle = 'bem536-internal-contour-autotest'

auditor_review = {
  'record_type':'audit',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'auditor',
  'to_role':'executor',
  'status':'completed',
  'decision':'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/auditor_review.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
}
executor_record = {
  'record_type':'execution',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'executor',
  'to_role':'auditor',
  'status':'completed',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem536/development_artifact.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':None,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'auditor_review.md').write_text('# BEM-536 Auditor Review\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Decision\nPASS_TO_EXECUTOR. Analyst plan is complete and safe.\n\n## Conditions\nExecutor must create development artifact and write transport execution record.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
(base/'development_artifact.md').write_text('# BEM-536 Development Artifact\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Purpose\nThis file is the concrete development artifact produced by the internal contour autotest.\n\n## Proven chain\ncurator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor.\n\n## Result\nExecutor patch completed. Awaiting final auditor and curator closure.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')

with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(auditor_review, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(executor_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)'
state['cycle_id'] = cycle
state['curator_status'] = 'WAITING_ROLE'
state['active_role'] = 'executor'
state['next_role'] = 'auditor'
state['current_task'] = {'id':'BEM-536.2','title':'Auditor approval + Executor patch','status':'completed'}
state['blocker'] = None
hist = state.get('history', [])
if not isinstance(hist, list):
    hist = [hist]
hist.append({'at':'2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)','event':'BEM-536 Task 2 completed: auditor approval and executor patch','status':'PASS'})
state['history'] = hist
role_state.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem536_task2_auditor_executor_patch.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-536 Task 2 | Auditor Approval + Executor Patch | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:34 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Auditor review PASS created.\n- Executor development artifact created.\n- Transport execution records appended.\n- role_cycle_state advanced to final auditor stage.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof = proofs/'bem536_task2_auditor_executor_patch.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-536 Task 2 PASS: auditor approval and executor development artifact completed. blocker=null\n')

changed_files.extend([str(base/'auditor_review.md'), str(base/'development_artifact.md'), str(transport), str(role_state), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-536 Task 2: auditor approval and executor patch completed')
